name: Mitty
description:
**Species**: Narehate

Mitty is an amorphous Narehate who lived with Nanachi on the 4th layer of the Abyss. Mitty had been a regular human girl in the past and her appearance changed due to the result of the ascension from the 6th layer.

~!In Ilblu, it is revealed that Belaf paid compensation to have an exact replica of Mitty born into the village from the time a "masked man" brought her along to the village. This reproduction even has an exact copy of Mitty's soul from that moment in time.!~
